data.requirement: Combine Status_Analysis, Customer_Info, Service_Options, Online_Services, and Payment_Info tables through customer_id to create a unified customer profile with demographics, service usage, payment details, and churn indicators
data.reason: Original requirement missed critical tables (Payment_Info, Online_Services) required for visualizations V2 and V4. Full integration ensures contract_type and internet_type are available for analysis

data.requirement: Create tenure cohorts (0-3mo,4-6mo,7-12mo,13-24mo,25+mo) and pre-binned age groups (20-29,30-39,...,70+)
data.reason: Simpler temporal grouping aligns with business reporting cycles. Pre-binning avoids runtime calculations and ensures consistent grouping across views

visualization.requirement: Grouped bar charts showing churn rates by contract types with clustered internet_type breakdown (instead of nested)
visualization.reason: Nested hierarchy creates readability issues with legend management. Clustered groups improve comparison between categorical combinations

visualization.requirement: Heat map of average satisfaction_score across age groups (rows) and binned number_of_dependents (0,1-2,3+)
visualization.reason: Reduces column count from 10 to 3 for better readability while maintaining analytical value

visualization.requirement: Multi-line chart showing CLTV trends across tenure cohorts, filtered to churned customers with churn_category color encoding
visualization.reason: Small multiples create fragmentation with 6 categories. Single view with color encoding improves trend comparison

interaction.requirement: Slider for age group selection using pre-binned cohorts (20-29,30-39,...)
interaction.reason: Dynamic runtime binning is impractical in Vega-Lite. Pre-binned groups allow efficient filtering via slider
